svg.title: Complete Multi-Region Observability Architecture
svg.desc: An AWS multi-region architecture with bespoke thin-stroke service icons. Organized in four bands. EDGE: Users → Route 53 (failover routing) → CloudFront, with health checks per region. COMPUTE: two regions (sa-east-1 PRIMARY, us-east-1 SECONDARY) each with ALB → ASG → 2 EC2 instances → RDS. CLOUDWATCH: Metrics, Logs, Alarms, EventBridge, Dashboard. NOTIFICATIONS: SNS fanning to Email and Lambda Slack notifier. Solid arrows for primary data flow; dashed for failover, monitoring, and observability bus.
